title: Senior Doctor - Alkem Laboratories - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Alkem Laboratories - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Alkem Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alkem Laboratories:
Alkem Laboratories is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories!
